title: Refined Woods
description: Refined Woods is a hybrid-resolution pack for builders. It pairs detailed 32x32 logs with crisp 16x16 planks, adding professional depth to your structures while keeping a clean, Vanilla+ aesthetic that remains lightweight and performance-friendly.
body:
Are you looking for more detail in your architectural structures without losing the classic Minecraft feel? Refined Woods is a custom resource pack built specifically to enhance the look of your logs and planks.

By utilizing a hybrid-resolution approach, this pack gives you the best of both worlds:

Structural Detail: Logs are upgraded to 32x32, providing finer grain definition and depth, making your pillars, beams, and structural frames look more professional and polished.

Surface Clarity: Planks remain at 16x16, ensuring that your walls, roofs, and flooring maintain the iconic, clean look of Minecraft that builders love, while keeping the pack lightweight and performance-friendly.

Why Choose Refined Woods?
Architectural Focus: Designed to make complex building palettes look seamless. Our updated color balance ensures that different wood types complement one another perfectly.

Hybrid Performance: Get the visual clarity of high-definition textures for your main structural logs without the hardware overhead usually associated with 32x32 packs.

Vanilla+ Aesthetic: We stay true to the spirit of the game. You won't find noisy or out-of-place textures here—just a cleaner, more refined version of the woods you already know.

Technical Specifications
Log Resolution: 32x32

Plank Resolution: 16x16

Style: Vanilla+ / Builder-Focused
